summary: Critical failure: NO bats test file provided despite explicit TDD requirement. Workflow references `tests/pr-label-assigner.bats` (line 46) but file doesn't exist. Task mandates 'write failing test FIRST' and 'all tests runnable with bats'—neither met. Workflow's bats installation (lines 21–27) is fragile with silent fallback to manual testing (lines 51–85)—creates 2x test paths. Script YAML parser brittle, regex-based, state-machine-heavy (in_labels_section). test-with-act.sh runs `act push --rm` 3x identically without varying fixtures. Duplication: manual tests repeat config-creation pattern (lines 56–85). Glob matching incomplete (comments mention char classes/`?` but not implemented). Would not ship: violates core TDD requirement, missing deliverable file, test harness doesn't validate structured output.
